prestazioni: Replace the stock Jaguar AJ-V8 Gen III 5.0L supercharged (engine code: AJ133S) with a Harrop HTV2650 supercharger (12psi boost, 650+ HP) paired with a custom Arrington Racing billet crankshaft and forged Mahle pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio) for sustained off-road power delivery.

Install a full Milltek Sport 3.5-inch stainless steel cat-back exhaust system with quad 4.5-inch black ceramic-coated tips, integrated X-pipe crossover, and secondary O2 sensor delete (via Cobb Accessport V3 with Stage 2+ off-road mapping) to optimize scavenging for the AJ133S’s dual-mode intake.

Upgrade the ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission with a Punch Powerglide Stage 3 valve body, Sonnax billet torque converter (2,800 RPM stall), and a Derale 13-row transmission cooler with integrated thermostatic bypass to handle the increased torque (550+ lb-ft) from the Harrop supercharger.
estetica: Fit a full Overfinch 60th Anniversary Edition wide-body kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and rocker panels) with integrated LED light pods (PIAA LP570s) and a custom front splitter with air curtains for brake cooling (AP Racing 6-piston calipers).

Replace the stock roof with a lightweight Alu-Cab II Expedition roof rack (anodized black) paired with a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch (synthetic rope, 12,000 lb capacity) and a custom front-mounted ARB bumper with integrated recovery points and a 30-inch Rigid Industries SAE-pattern LED light bar.

Install a set of Rotiform LAS-R 18x9.5-inch wheels (ET25 offset) wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 285/70R18 tires, paired with Eibach Pro-Truck 2.0 lift springs (2-inch lift) and Fox 2.0 Performance Series IFP shocks (remote reservoirs) for 12 inches of wheel travel.
